testcase.name: getSecondaryCustomer2

failure.message: expected [{"SecondaryCustomer":{"Success":true,"Data":{"Detail":[{"LocationId":"ELECWAT001","PrimaryCustomerId":"CUSTOMER007","Customer":{"Id":"03332301204","Status":"Current","Type":"Individual","SSN":"","Name":{"Title":"Mr.","First":"Talha","Middle":"","Last":"Rahim"}},"StartDate":"2019-05-01","EndDate":"1900-01-01","IncludeOnStatement":false,"FinancialResponsible":true,"PrintCollectionNotices":false,"PrintTestNotices":false,"IndividualNotices":false,"Transfer":false,"BillCopy":false,"Relationship":{"Id":0,"Description":"","IsSpouse":false}}]},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"result":{"Success":false,"Message":"Error: Timeout: Request failed to complete in 15000ms"}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"SecondaryCustomer":{"Success":true,"Data":{"Detail":[{"LocationId":"ELECWAT001","PrimaryCustomerId":"CUSTOMER007","Customer":{"Id":"03332301204","Status":"Current","Type":"Individual","SSN":"","Name":{"Title":"Mr.","First":"Talha","Middle":"","Last":"Rahim"}},"StartDate":"2019-05-01","EndDate":"1900-01-01","IncludeOnStatement":false,"FinancialResponsible":true,"PrintCollectionNotices":false,"PrintTestNotices":false,"IndividualNotices":false,"Transfer":false,"BillCopy":false,"Relationship":{"Id":0,"Description":"","IsSpouse":false}}]},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"result":{"Success":false,"Message":"Error: Timeout: Request failed to complete in 15000ms"}}] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: putupdateCustomerCard

failure.message: expected [{"result":[{"success":true,"message":"Customer Card Updated."}]}] but found [{"result":{"result":{"id":"\"cmacdonald@gmail.com\"","Success":false,"Message":["EmailAddress must be a valid email","PhoneNumber1 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","PhoneNumber2 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","PhoneNumber3 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","TypeID1 must be a number","TypeID2 must be a number","TypeID3 must be a number"],"Values":{"CustomerId":"\"CUSTOMER003\"","EmailAddress":"\"cmacdonald@gmail.com\"","PhoneNumber1":"\"\"","PhoneNumber2":"\"\"","PhoneNumber3":"\"\"","TypeID1":"\"1\"","TypeID2":"\"2\"","TypeID3":"\"3\"","Version":"\"4.0.0\""}}}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"result":[{"success":true,"message":"Customer Card Updated."}]}] but found [{"result":{"result":{"id":"\"cmacdonald@gmail.com\"","Success":false,"Message":["EmailAddress must be a valid email","PhoneNumber1 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","PhoneNumber2 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","PhoneNumber3 with value fails to match the required pattern: /^\\d+$/","TypeID1 must be a number","TypeID2 must be a number","TypeID3 must be a number"],"Values":{"CustomerId":"\"CUSTOMER003\"","EmailAddress":"\"cmacdonald@gmail.com\"","PhoneNumber1":"\"\"","PhoneNumber2":"\"\"","PhoneNumber3":"\"\"","TypeID1":"\"1\"","TypeID2":"\"2\"","TypeID3":"\"3\"","Version":"\"4.0.0\""}}}}] testcase.name: putupdateCustomersInfov4

failure.message: expected [{"Customer":[{"Acknowledge":0,"Success":false,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Customer is the current customer for one or more locations and cannot be marked inactive."}]}]}] but found [{"result":{"id":"\"{\\\"Customer\\\":[{\\\"CustomerId\\\":\\\"CUSTOMER009\\\",\\\"CustomerType\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":1,\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Individual\\\"},\\\"Inactive\\\":true,\\\"CustomerClass\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"RES-METERED\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Residental Metered\\\"},\\\"Name\\\":{\\\"Title\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"2\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Mr.\\\"},\\\"FirstName\\\":\\\"Anthony\\\",\\\"MiddleName\\\":\\\"W\\\",\\\"LastName\\\":\\\"Bendetto\\\",\\\"NameSuffix\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"MaidenName\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"PlaceOfWork\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"PrimaryLanguage\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"EmailAddress\\\":\\\"uCustomer009@cogsdale.com\\\",\\\"SSN\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"765765\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"DateOfBirth\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"2031-04-11\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"AlternateId\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"IssuedBy\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"Country\\\":\\\"USA\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"BusinessAs\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"Confirm\\\":0,\\\"Success\\\":true,\\\"Messages\\\":[{\\\"Enabled\\\":0,\\\"Info\\\":\\\"\\\"}]}]}\"","Success":false,"Message":["JSONData must be of type object"],"Values":{"JSONData":"\"{\\\"Customer\\\":[{\\\"CustomerId\\\":\\\"CUSTOMER009\\\",\\\"CustomerType\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":1,\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Individual\\\"},\\\"Inactive\\\":true,\\\"CustomerClass\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"RES-METERED\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Residental Metered\\\"},\\\"Name\\\":{\\\"Title\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"2\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Mr.\\\"},\\\"FirstName\\\":\\\"Anthony\\\",\\\"MiddleName\\\":\\\"W\\\",\\\"LastName\\\":\\\"Bendetto\\\",\\\"NameSuffix\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"MaidenName\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"PlaceOfWork\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"PrimaryLanguage\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"EmailAddress\\\":\\\"uCustomer009@cogsdale.com\\\",\\\"SSN\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"765765\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"DateOfBirth\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"2031-04-11\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"AlternateId\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"IssuedBy\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"Country\\\":\\\"USA\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"BusinessAs\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"Confirm\\\":0,\\\"Success\\\":true,\\\"Messages\\\":[{\\\"Enabled\\\":0,\\\"Info\\\":\\\"\\\"}]}]}\"","UserId":"sa"}}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Customer":[{"Acknowledge":0,"Success":false,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Customer is the current customer for one or more locations and cannot be marked inactive."}]}]}] but found [{"result":{"id":"\"{\\\"Customer\\\":[{\\\"CustomerId\\\":\\\"CUSTOMER009\\\",\\\"CustomerType\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":1,\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Individual\\\"},\\\"Inactive\\\":true,\\\"CustomerClass\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"RES-METERED\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Residental must be of type testcase.name: putupdateCustomersInfov4Pos

failure.message: expected [{"Customer":[{"Acknowledge":0,"Success":true,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Customer updated."}]}]}] but found [{"result":{"id":"\"{\\\"Customer\\\":[{\\\"CustomerId\\\":\\\"TESTCUSTOMER1\\\",\\\"CustomerType\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":1,\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Individual\\\"},\\\"Inactive\\\":true,\\\"CustomerClass\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"RES-METERED\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Residental Metered\\\"},\\\"Name\\\":{\\\"Title\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"2\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Mr.\\\"},\\\"FirstName\\\":\\\"Anthony\\\",\\\"MiddleName\\\":\\\"W\\\",\\\"LastName\\\":\\\"Bendetto\\\",\\\"NameSuffix\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"MaidenName\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"PlaceOfWork\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"PrimaryLanguage\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"EmailAddress\\\":\\\"uCustomer009@cogsdale.com\\\",\\\"SSN\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"765765\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"DateOfBirth\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"2031-04-11\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"AlternateId\\\":{\\\"Value\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"IssuedBy\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"Country\\\":\\\"USA\\\",\\\"IsDirty\\\":false},\\\"BusinessAs\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"Confirm\\\":0,\\\"Success\\\":true,\\\"Messages\\\":[{\\\"Enabled\\\":0,\\\"Info\\\":\\\"\\\"}]}]}\"","Success":false,"Message":["JSONData must be of type object"],"Values":{"JSONData":"\"{\\\"Customer\\\":[{\\\"CustomerId\\\":\\\"TESTCUSTOMER1\\\",\\\"CustomerType\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":1,\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Individual\\\"},\\\"Inactive\\\":true,\\\"CustomerClass\\\":{\\\"Id\\\":\\\"RES-METERED\\\",\\\"Description\\\":\\\"Residental
